assertions.description: Crystal circuit detection is accurate: X1 at 32.000MHz_10ppm with two 15pF load caps (C1, C2) giving effective CL=10.5pF (typical for TCXO/crystal). Consistent across all three schematics.

Rev-A: 33 total components (1 IC, 20 caps, 6 inductors, 3 connectors, 1 crystal, 2 test points) with correct values and footprints. 0R and n.a. values preserved faithfully. Consistent with schematic content.
